vocab.meaning: sự tò mò không bao giờ thỏa mãn
vocab.example: I had an insatiable curiosity about nature, often spending hours observing ants in the garden.
Sundays were usually dedicated to communal play with all the children in our neighborhood.

vocab.meaning: một trí tưởng tượng phong phú/sống động
vocab.example: Blessed with a vivid imagination, I used to transform my bedroom into a spacecraft using just blankets and pillows.
We would often wander into the woods and stumble upon hidden streams or peculiar rock formations.

vocab.meaning: những thú vui kỳ ảo/đầy mơ mộng
vocab.example: Most of my childhood was filled with whimsical pursuits like writing fairy tales and building miniature fairy houses.

vocab.meaning: khám phá thông qua xúc giác (chạm, nặn)
vocab.example: I was very fond of tactile exploration, especially playing with clay and mud to create haphazard sculptures.

vocab.meaning: sự gắng sức/vận động thể chất
vocab.example: Despite the heat, I loved the physical exertion of long-distance cycling around my hometown.

vocab.meaning: sự yêu thích đầy hoài niệm
vocab.example: I look back at our kite-flying competitions with a deep nostalgic fondness.

vocab.meaning: thú vui giải trí một mình
vocab.example: While others played football, I preferred solitary leisure, such as painting landscapes in the backyard.

vocab.meaning: đắm chìm sâu sắc vào cái gì
vocab.example: I would be deeply immersed in my father’s old collection of National Geographic magazines for hours on end.
